message.content:
@startuml
title int PI::calculate(double measured, double resultBuffer)

participant "Aktuatorenhed" as Aktuator
participant "PI" as PI

Aktuator -> PI: calculate(measured, resultBuffer)

activate PI

PI: error = _setpoint - measured
PI: integral = (_Ts/2)*(error+_preError)+_preIntegral
note right of PI: udregning af integrale

PI: maxIntegral = (100*_Ti)/_Kp
note right of PI: Anti-Windup

alt [integral > maxIntegral]
  PI: integral = maxIntegral
else [integral < 0]
  PI: integral = 0
end

PI: proportional = error
note right of PI: udregning af proportional

PI: controlSignal = _Kp*(proportional+(1/_Ti)*integral)
note right of PI: udregning af styresignal

opt [controlSignal < _minOut]
  PI: controlSignal = _minOut
  note right of PI: Max, Min afgrænsninger. 0-100% dutycycle
end

opt [controlSignal > _maxOut]
  PI: controlSignal = _maxOut
end

PI: resultBuffer = controlSignal
note right of PI: return result

PI: _preError = error
PI: _preIntegrale=integrale
note right of PI: Opdater hukommelse for error og integral

alt [controlSignal == _minOut]
  return -1
else [controlSignal == _maxOut]
  return -2
end

return 0

deactivate PI

@enduml
